title: Conclave
logline: Cardinal Lawrence oversees a papal conclave to elect a new pope, but discovers dark secrets and conspiracies among the candidates that threaten the future of the Catholic Church.
antagonistOrConflict: Political corruption and power struggles within the Vatican hierarchy

actBreaks.description: Cardinals enter the Sistine Chapel and the conclave officially begins

validation.ruling: Scene #17 effectively closes Act 1 by showing the Sistine Chapel's physical transformation for the conclave. Lawrence watching the sealing of windows and preparation chaos symbolizes the point of no return - the conclave machinery is now in motion and cannot be stopped.

actBreaks.description: First failed ballots and political maneuvering intensifies

validation.ruling: Scene #73 serves as a functional Act 2 ending by establishing the political landscape before major revelations. Lawrence's emergence as an unexpected candidate and Tedesco's strategic commentary creates the setup for Act 3's investigative focus, though the dramatic intensity is moderate.

actBreaks.description: Final voting begins leading to Benitez's unexpected election

validation.ruling: Scene #128 provides a powerful Act 3 conclusion with Lawrence's moral crisis as he votes for himself, followed immediately by the explosive external intervention. The combination of internal sin and external divine intervention creates a perfect climactic moment that launches the resolution.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: Classical three-act structure with procedural thriller elements, building tension through multiple voting rounds
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: Deliberate, methodical pacing that mirrors the formal conclave process, with increasing urgency as secrets are revealed and political alliances shift

incitingIncident.description: In the shockingly plain papal bedroom, Lawrence joins three senior cardinals kneeling around the dead Pope's body in prayer.

validation.ruling: Scene #8 shows Lawrence's arrival but Scene #9 delivers the true inciting incident - Lawrence confronting the Pope's death in the papal bedroom with three senior cardinals. This moment of 'shockingly plain papal bedroom' with the dead Pope's body creates the story catalyst that launches the conclave narrative. The visual and emotional impact of this scene, combined with its higher tension (8 vs 3), makes it the proper story catalyst.

midpoint.description: Lawrence speaks privately with Sister Shanumi, a Nigerian nun, after dismissing the resistant Sister Agnes from the room.
midpoint.sceneHeading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - DAY

validation.ruling: Scene #96 perfectly captures the midpoint transformation as Lawrence takes decisive action by invoking confession to break Sister Shanumi's silence about Adeyemi. This scene represents Lawrence's evolution from passive administrator to active investigator, using his ecclesiastical authority to uncover truth. The formal offer of confession is both tactically brilliant and morally complex, marking the story's central turning point.

climax.description: Lawrence confronts Benitez in the Room of Tears about the Geneva clinic treatment. Benitez calmly reveals the profound secret - he is intersex, born with both male and female characteristics, making him technically neither fully man nor woman.
climax.sceneHeading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - CONTINUOUS

validation.ruling: While Scene #142 shows the election aftermath, Scene #146 (Room of Tears revelation) delivers the true climactic confrontation. Lawrence discovering Benitez's secret creates the story's ultimate crisis of faith and moral decision. This private revelation scene provides the emotional and thematic climax that forces Lawrence's final character transformation, making it more structurally sound than the post-election administrative scene.

scenes.heading: EXT. APARTMENT BLOCK - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A quiet modern apartment block in Rome at night sets an ominous tone as the city sleeps before a significant event.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: A sleeping man is awakened by a cracking window pane and urgent phone call, immediately establishing foreboding atmosphere.

scenes.heading: EXT. TUNNEL NEAR VATICAN - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The man rushes through empty tunnels near the Vatican, his disheveled appearance suggesting urgent summons in the night.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET NEAR VATICAN - ROME - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lawrence continues his hurried journey through deserted Roman streets toward the pulsing blue lights at St. Peter's.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHOP - STREET NEAR VATICAN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence passes a shop window displaying plastic religious figurines, symbolizing the commercialization surrounding sacred events.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lawrence prepares himself in the elevator, transforming from disheveled administrator to composed church leader before facing security.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence navigates through heavy security and grieving Archbishop Wozniak in the papal corridor of Casa Santa Marta.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence realizes with painful surprise that he was among the last summoned to witness the Pope's death.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence's late arrival hints at his peripheral position in Vatican politics

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In the shockingly plain papal bedroom, Lawrence joins three senior cardinals kneeling around the dead Pope's body in prayer.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Pope's death officially begins the power struggle for succession

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence finds Cardinal Bellini contemplating the Pope's chess set, seeking a keepsake from their departed leader's sparse possessions.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - SITTING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence questions Archbishop Wozniak about discovering the Pope's body while Cardinal Tremblay arrives to control the narrative and delay notifications.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tremblay's manipulation of information flow reveals early political maneuvering

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence makes urgent phone calls to notify other cardinals of the Pope's death, including a suspicious conversation with Cardinal Tedesco.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The papal suite is ceremonially sealed as the Pope's body is removed, marking the official beginning of the interregnum period.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - FACADE - MORNING
scenes.summary: Electronic shutters are installed over Casa Santa Marta windows as part of conclave security preparations.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BEDROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Workers test the electronic window shutters that will seal the cardinals inside during the conclave proceedings.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - MORNING
scenes.summary: Televisions are systematically removed from all bedrooms to maintain communication isolation during the conclave.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING
scenes.summary: The Sistine Chapel undergoes dramatic transformation as windows are sealed, floors covered, and electronic jammers installed for secrecy.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ANTECHAMBER - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence descends into the antechamber behind the Sistine Chapel's altar, seeking refuge from the preparation chaos above.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - MORNING
scenes.summary: In the Room of Tears, Lawrence examines papal vestments while discussing with Bellini his unexpected duty and the Pope's untimely death.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes leads a group of nuns arriving by minibus to serve during the conclave at Casa Santa Marta.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - MORNING
scenes.summary: The nuns disembark and enter Casa Santa Marta to begin their service duties for the assembled cardinals.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: The nuns officially enter the lobby of Casa Santa Marta to begin their conclave preparations and service.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes settles into her office and feeds her canary, establishing her methodical character and attention to detail.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence welcomes the first groups of arriving cardinals in the courtyard, including African and Eastern Ministry delegations.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - LATER
scenes.summary: More cardinals arrive including the imposing Adeyemi and overweight Cardinal Guttoso, each bringing their distinct personalities to the gathering.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Lawrence waits with staff for remaining arrivals while discussing missing Cardinal Tedesco and expressing hope he won't attend.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BEDROOMS - EVENING
scenes.summary: Nuns silently prepare the cardinal's bedrooms with military precision, turning down beds and smoothing pillows.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BATHROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Small toiletry packets are carefully placed in bathrooms by the attending nuns as final preparations are completed.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECURITY GATE - EVENING
scenes.summary: Cardinals surrender mobile phones and pass through metal detectors under Sister Agnes's watchful supervision before official sequestration.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STORAGE ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Confiscated electronic devices are methodically catalogued and stored in labeled plastic bags by the nuns.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - HALLWAY - EVENING
scenes.summary: Lawrence hurries to meet someone, impatiently asking about their location while dismissing assistance from his staff.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - MEETING ROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: Archbishop Wozniak, clearly intoxicated and distressed, attempts confession while revealing troubling information about Cardinal Tremblay and the Pope's final meeting.
scenes.turningPointNote: Wozniak's revelation about Tremblay's secret meeting with the Pope introduces major corruption subplot

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The Casa Santa Marta is sealed shut with Lawrence watching Wozniak depart as security locks down the building for conclave.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHENS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: 107 nuns work silently in the kitchens preparing the evening meal for the cardinals in hushed, focused concentration.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes inspects table settings with military precision, correcting silverware placement for the evening dinner service.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MAR TA - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence discovers an unexpected 108th cardinal has arrived, claiming to have been secretly appointed 'in pectore' by the late Pope.
scenes.turningPointNote: Benitez's surprise arrival disrupts established conclave dynamics and voting calculations

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN STORAGE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and other officials observe the mysterious Cardinal Benitez from Afghanistan through glass, debating the impossibility and danger of his position.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and Bellini meet Cardinal Benitez, who explains his dangerous mission in Afghanistan and determination to participate despite security risks.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence encounters Cardinal Adeyemi in the corridor as both retire to their rooms, sharing awkward pleasantries about tomorrow's proceedings.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence works alone in his sealed room on his crucial opening homily while hearing intimate sounds from neighboring cardinals through thin walls.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S BATHROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence practices his homily in the bathroom mirror, feeling contempt for his own diplomatic language and political maneuvering.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: During dinner, Lawrence introduces Cardinal Benitez to the assembly, explaining his secret appointment and dangerous mission in Afghanistan while cardinals react with varying degrees of acceptance and suspicion.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - AULA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Liberal cardinals led by Bellini and Lawrence discuss voting predictions, estimating Tedesco's strength at fifteen votes and Bellini's at twenty-five.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - TREMBLAY’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Cardinal Tremblay about Wozniak's claim that the Pope demanded his resignation, but Tremblay denies it and questions Wozniak's mental state.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tremblay's denial creates doubt about the corruption allegations, deepening the mystery

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence lies awake unable to sleep due to loud snoring from the adjacent room, highlighting the claustrophobic conditions.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - GYM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence exercises alone on a treadmill in the early morning, staring at his reflection as the first day of conclave officially begins.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence looks down from a balcony at the sea of red-robed cardinals gathered in the courtyard, feeling trepidation about the proceedings ahead.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SIDE ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Father Haas helps Lawrence don his ceremonial vestments and golden crozier, preparing him for his crucial role as Dean of the College.

scenes.heading: INT. “ROOM OF CARDINALS” - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits before the assembled congregation of cardinals, bishops, and priests, nervously clutching his sermon while surveying the main papal contenders.

scenes.heading: INT. “ROOM OF CARDINALS” ANTECHAMBER - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence begins his pivotal opening homily, warning against the sin of certainty while Sister Agnes and nuns listen outside, as he declares that even Christ was not certain at the end.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence's homily about uncertainty establishes the moral theme and sets the tone for the entire conclave

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks through the courtyard crowded with cardinals, feeling their scrutinizing eyes upon him after his controversial sermon.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SIDE ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence is disrobed by assistants who avoid eye contact. O'Malley awkwardly asks about archiving his undelivered homily, revealing the stir his actual sermon caused.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Tedesco confronts Lawrence in the lobby about his sermon on St. Paul as an apostle of doubt, drawing unwanted public attention.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY LIFT - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence realizes he forgot his room key and has to return to the lobby, ruining his dignified exit from Tedesco.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes sternly gives Lawrence her pass key. Bellini confronts him about stepping forward despite claiming he wanted to resign.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals board white minibuses in the rain as sacred music plays, preparing for the conclave's first voting session.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits alone on the bus, contemplating through rain-smeared windows as the weight of responsibility settles on all the cardinals.

scenes.heading: EXT. CORTILE DEL MARESCIALLO - DAY
scenes.summary: Security forces wait outside in the courtyard while the cardinals take their solemn oath inside the chapel.

scenes.heading: INT. SCALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: A security guard waits on the marble staircase while cardinals take their oath, heard in voice-over reciting Latin vows.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: The final cardinals complete their oath in the Sistine Chapel. Lawrence stares up at Michelangelo's Last Judgment depicting the damned being dragged down.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: The chapel doors are closed and locked from the outside, sealing the cardinals in for the conclave.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence announces the first ballot from the microphone. The conclave officially begins as St. Peter's bell tolls five o'clock.
scenes.turningPointNote: Official start of the papal election process

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: The first ballot is counted by three scrutineers. Tedesco receives the opening vote as Lawrence marks his tally sheet.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Near the end of vote counting, ballots are cast for Bellini, Tremblay, Adeyemi, and finally Benitez as Lawrence tallies the results.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Archbishop Mandorff unlocks and opens the chapel doors after the first ballot concludes.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley burns the ballot papers in the first stove, then activates the second stove containing chemicals for the smoke signal.

scenes.heading: INT. INSIDE THE STOVE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Inside the stove, the chemical canister activates with a whoosh, preparing to create the colored smoke signal.

scenes.heading: EXT. SISTINE CHAPEL - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Jet-black smoke pours from the chapel chimney, illuminated by searchlights, signaling to the waiting world that no pope was chosen.

scenes.heading: INT. EMPTY ROOMS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Empty Vatican rooms lie still in the late afternoon light as crowds roar outside. A caged canary listens in the silence.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley briefs Lawrence on media interest in the unlisted Cardinal Benitez, providing biographical details of his humanitarian work in conflict zones.

scenes.heading: INT. SCALA REGIA - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: On the marble staircase, O'Malley reports that Monsignor Morales defended Tremblay but seemed untruthful, raising Lawrence's suspicions.

scenes.heading: I/E. MINIBUS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: On the bus, Sabbadin criticizes Lawrence's sermon and dismisses his papal chances, while Lawrence insists he doesn't want the position.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: At dinner, Adeyemi appears to be the frontrunner with the largest crowd. Tedesco and Tremblay confront Lawrence about his unexpected votes.

scenes.heading: EXT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - PORTONE DI BRONZO - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence and O'Malley walk toward the bronze entrance to the Apostolic Palace, passing saluting Swiss Guards.

scenes.heading: INT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The two men walk in silence up the deserted staircase toward the traditional Papal Apartments.

scenes.heading: INT. APOSTOLIC PALACE - SALA - NIGHT
scenes.summary: They cross through a large room in the Apostolic Palace, moving toward their destination.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SECRETARY’S OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence searches through filing cabinets in the Papal Secretary's office but finds nothing, feeling the investigation is unseemly.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - FOUNTAIN - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence encounters Benitez by a fountain with the Pope's turtles. Benitez sees them as symbols of healing and transformation.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Walking together, Benitez reveals he voted for Lawrence and listens as Lawrence explains his intention to resign after the conclave.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence finds Bellini at the sealed Papal suite. Bellini accuses him of ambition and warns about Tedesco's vicious attacks on the late Pope.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRE NCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence kneels in prayer by his bed but exhaustion overcomes him and he begins falling asleep while kneeling.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In a dream, Lawrence kneels by the late Pope's bed. The Pope's eyes open and he appears about to speak something vital.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence wakes at 2:55am hearing hushed urgent conversation between a man and woman - Adeyemi and a female voice arguing.
scenes.turningPointNote: Discovery of Adeyemi's secret nighttime encounter

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence peers into the corridor and catches a glimpse of blue uniform disappearing around the corner before closing his door.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits on his bed with his mind racing about what he witnessed. The second day of conclave begins.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD - MORNING
scenes.summary: In the courtyard, bleary-eyed Lawrence tells O'Malley he slept well but decides to walk instead of taking the bus.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks through Vatican Gardens followed by security. Adeyemi joins him, praising his homily and discussing their mutual tests of faith.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING
scenes.summary: The second ballot results: Adeyemi leads with 34 votes, Tedesco has 25, and Lawrence surprisingly gains 16 votes.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MORNING / LATER
scenes.summary: The third ballot shows Adeyemi surging to 52 votes, positioning him close to the required two-thirds majority for election.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Nuns watch black smoke rising from an explosion in the city. Sister Agnes allows them to continue praying as sirens wail in the distance.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: O'Malley informs Lawrence of an explosion at Piazza Barberini with injuries but no fatalities. Lawrence orders the cardinals be shielded from this news.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - DAY
scenes.summary: At lunch, cardinals discuss Adeyemi's likely victory and the historic nature of the first Black Pope while sensing something happened outside.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM BUFFET - DAY
scenes.summary: African Cardinals approach Lawrence with mournful expressions, explaining that a nun confronted Adeyemi, shouted something, and caused him to flee.
scenes.turningPointNote: Public confrontation threatens Adeyemi's candidacy

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - KITCHEN - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence searches the kitchen full of nuns for the one who confronted Adeyemi, learning she's with Sister Agnes in the back office.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - OUTSIDE BAC K OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes tries to prevent Lawrence from speaking to the nun, insisting she's handling the situation, but Lawrence forces entry to the office.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence speaks privately with Sister Shanumi, a Nigerian nun, after dismissing the resistant Sister Agnes from the room.
scenes.turningPointNote: Key interrogation that will reveal Adeyemi's secret

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - CORRIDOR - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence walks determinedly to Adeyemi's room and knocks. Adeyemi, drying his face, lets him enter.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - ADEYEMI’S ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Adeyemi about his relationship with the nun. Adeyemi claims it's a plot against him but admits to the relationship and a son.
scenes.turningPointNote: Adeyemi's confession destroys his papal candidacy

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - DAY
scenes.summary: High angle view of Lawrence meeting with Nakitanda and African Cardinals in the gardens, informing them of Adeyemi's situation as Nakitanda drops his head in dismay.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: During the fourth and fifth ballots, Adeyemi walks to vote with dignity while the African Cardinals pointedly avert their eyes from their fallen champion.
scenes.turningPointNote: Adeyemi's support collapses, reshaping the entire election

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lombardi announces the fifth ballot results - Tremblay leads with 40 votes, Tedesco has 34, Bellini drops to 13. Cardinals react to the new frontrunner with surprise and tension.
scenes.turningPointNote: Tremblay emerges as clear frontrunner, fundamentally shifting the power dynamics

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - EVENING
scenes.summary: In the empty chapel vestibule, O'Malley offers Lawrence more information about the morning's incident, but Lawrence refuses to hear it to avoid interference. O'Malley reveals Benitez had a return ticket to Geneva paid by the Pope's account.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Exhausted Lawrence struggles to remove his shoes in his room when Bellini and Sabbadin arrive at his door, needing to discuss strategy.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK STAIRS - NIGHT
scenes.summary: On back stairs, Sabbadin and Bellini discuss their dire situation - Bellini lacks support and considers withdrawing. They debate whom Bellini's supporters should back, with Sabbadin bluntly stating neither Lawrence nor Bellini can win.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In the elevator, Lawrence encounters Cardinal Lowenstein and witnesses Tedesco and Adeyemi emerging together from a room. Adeyemi's expression toward Lawrence has shifted from remorse to defiance and hostility.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LIFT - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Still in the elevator with the wheezing Lowenstein, Lawrence grimly processes what he's witnessed - the formation of a new right-wing voting bloc between Tedesco and Adeyemi.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - UPPER CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Benitez cautiously peers from his door and invites Lawrence in for a word, but surprises him by disappearing back inside to dress properly before allowing entry.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BENITEZ ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: In Benitez's candlelit room, they discuss prayer and meditation. Benitez gently advises Lawrence about finding silence to hear God. Lawrence asks about Benitez's vote and expresses uncertainty about continuing as Dean.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In the dining room, Lawrence observes the two factions - Tedesco now sits with Adeyemi and African cardinals while Tremblay campaigns among his supporters. Lawrence watches the political maneuvering with disgust.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence meets with Sister Agnes, who reveals that Sister Shanumi has been sent back to Nigeria on an evening flight. Agnes suggests the arrangements were made through Paris but deflects Lawrence's questions.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STAIRCASE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: After dinner, Lawrence intercepts Tremblay on the staircase among his supporters, requesting a private word. Tremblay's confident smile turns wary as Lawrence leads him away.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - COURTYARD CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: In the cold courtyard corridor, Lawrence directly demands Tremblay withdraw from the next ballot. When Tremblay resists, Lawrence reveals he knows about a report into Tremblay's activities and the Pope's dismissal of him.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence directly confronts Tremblay with knowledge of his corruption, escalating the conflict

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE'S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Alone in his room, Lawrence lies praying but finds no guidance. Hearing Adeyemi's snoring, he makes a decision and retrieves the pass key Sister Agnes lent him.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PAPAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence silently walks down the papal corridor to the sealed papal suite. He stares at the locked door with its votive candles, builds his courage, then uses the pass key to break the seals and enter.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence explores the papal suite and office, finding only simple personal items in the briefcase - a razor, mints, and a book with an underlined passage about judgment and what we have done versus read.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes discovers the broken seals of the papal suite and sees light beneath the door. She stops and listens as Lawrence turns off the light, sensing someone outside.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence stands in darkness, holding his breath, aware that someone is just outside the door - creating a tense moment of potential discovery.

scenes.heading: INT. OUTSIDE THE PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes recognizes that Lawrence is on the other side of the door. In a strange moment of connection, she chooses not to confront him and walks away when other nuns pass.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL SUITE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: After Agnes leaves, Lawrence switches the light back on and continues his covert search of the papal quarters.

scenes.heading: INT. PAPAL BEDROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: In the papal bedroom, Lawrence finds only empty spaces and the Pope's personal effects - spectacles and alarm clock - which finally break his composure and leave him emotionally wracked.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - UPPER CORRIDOR - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Late at night, a surprised Bellini opens his door to find Lawrence outside with urgent business.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BELLINI’S ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: Lawrence shows Bellini the damning report on Tremblay's simony - evidence that he bought votes through financial payments to multiple cardinals. They discuss the Pope's surveillance and distrust of everyone, including themselves.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence reveals concrete evidence of Tremblay's corruption, providing the ammunition to destroy his candidacy

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECURITY GATE - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: At dawn, security checks nuns arriving for breakfast duty as the new day of the conclave begins.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - STORAGE ROOM - EARLY MORNING
scenes.summary: In a storage room, Lawrence struggles with a photocopier to copy the confidential report. Sister Agnes appears behind him, offering help while noting the document's sensitive nature.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Sister Agnes distributes large brown envelopes containing copies of the report to each cardinal's place as they arrive for breakfast.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - DINING ROOM - MORNING / LATER
scenes.summary: The dining room buzzes with excitement as cardinals read the damning report. Sabbadin angrily confronts Lawrence for wasting leverage they could have used to control Tremblay. Tremblay arrives and loudly confronts Lawrence about the leak.
scenes.turningPointNote: The corruption report goes public, destroying Tremblay's candidacy and dramatically reshaping the election

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PRAYER ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Lawrence and Bellini pray together. Bellini wryly notes they're running out of favorites and asks Lawrence's forgiveness for past criticism, acknowledging Lawrence is steering the conclave toward an unknown destination.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence stares at a blank ballot for the first time, uncertain whom to vote for. Under Tedesco's amused, complicit gaze, he reluctantly writes his own name, knowing he's about to sin.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - DAY
scenes.summary: Security guards with drawn guns burst into the chapel vestibule as an external crisis unfolds, frightening everyone present.
scenes.turningPointNote: External violence/bombing forces immediate suspension of the conclave

scenes.heading: INT. PAULINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: In Pauline Chapel, Lawrence stares at Michelangelo's Crucifixion fresco while O'Malley reports that everyone is safe but there's serious damage outside in the city. Lawrence contemplates darkness and smoke in the painting.

scenes.heading: I/E. POLICE CAR - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence rides in a police car with sirens blaring through Vatican courtyards, observing Swiss Guards and military helicopters with missiles overhead in the crisis response.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence strides purposefully through the Casa Santa Marta courtyard past frightened nuns and curia, with Mandorff following as he demands complete privacy.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence addresses the assembled cardinals about the crisis. Despite procedural objections from Tedesco supporters, he wins majority approval to brief the conclave on external events, overriding attempts to delay information.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - SECOND FLOOR - DAY
scenes.summary: A nun walks quickly away from the camera in a transitional moment.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA/ EXT AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: Cardinals exit down the steps after the emergency briefing.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA/ EXT AULA - DAY
scenes.summary: Nuns walk quickly down a stairway in the aftermath of the crisis briefing.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA COURTYARD - DAY
scenes.summary: Various shots of nuns and cardinals in the courtyard having animated conversations in small groups following the dramatic revelations about the outside crisis.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASA SANTA MARTA - PARKING - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence sits alone in the parking area, digesting the contentious gathering as light rain falls. Archbishop Mandorff approaches about transportation arrangements.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GARDENS - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence leads all the cardinals on foot through Vatican Gardens under umbrellas in the rain, with helicopters overhead. A sense of silent solidarity emerges as he and Bellini walk arm in arm, united again.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: In the damaged Sistine Chapel with broken windows, Lawrence begins what he senses will be the final ballot of the conclave, opening with the traditional Latin prayer for guidance.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - MONTAGE - DAY
scenes.summary: Montage of the final ballot process - votes being cast, counted, and tallied. In slow motion, cardinals rise applauding as they gather around the newly elected Pope at the center.
scenes.turningPointNote: Benitez is elected Pope in the final ballot, resolving the central election

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY / LATER
scenes.summary: Lawrence prepares the deed of acceptance with Mandorff, filling in Benitez's name. He notices O'Malley standing transfixed and staring with strange fixity, interrupting his reverie about starting the victory procedures.

scenes.heading: INT. SALA REGIA - DAY
scenes.summary: In private, O'Malley reveals disturbing information he's discovered about Benitez's trip to Switzerland - it wasn't to a hospital as assumed, but to a clinic, leaving Lawrence stricken about the implications.
scenes.turningPointNote: Revelation that Benitez went to a clinic, not hospital, suggesting a major secret

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - DAY
scenes.summary: Lawrence strides urgently through the chapel toward the Room of Tears where the new Pope should be getting dressed.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ANTECHAMBER - DAY
scenes.summary: Father Haas opens the door to report that the new Pope won't get robed. Lawrence insists on entering the antechamber despite the concerning situation.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - ROOM OF TEARS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Lawrence confronts Benitez in the Room of Tears about the Geneva clinic treatment. Benitez calmly reveals the profound secret - he is intersex, born with both male and female characteristics, making him technically neither fully man nor woman.
scenes.turningPointNote: Benitez reveals he is intersex - the ultimate secret that could reshape everything

scenes.heading: INT. PAULINE CHAPEL - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: In the vast Pauline Chapel, Lawrence sits alone trying to absorb Benitez's revelation. A small turtle works its way across the marble toward him - an absurd, gentle moment that he finds oddly meaningful.

scenes.heading: INT. SISTINE CHAPEL - VESTIBULE - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: O'Malley burns all the conclave records and ballots in the stove, then activates the chemical canister. He watches the smoke rise up through the flue and out the window to signal the election's completion.

scenes.heading: EXT. VATICAN GROUNDS - LATE AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Lawrence returns the turtle to the fountain, then hears the distant roar of a quarter million voices celebrating as white smoke rises from the Vatican, announcing the new Pope to the world.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LAWRENCE’S BEDROOM - EVENING
scenes.summary: In his bedroom, Lawrence packs his belongings feeling both exhausted and accomplished. As the metal shutters rise and he opens his window to let in air and sunlight, he smiles with contentment at his completed task.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - LOBBY - EVENING
scenes.summary: The shutters in the Casa Santa Marta lobby rise, letting in the evening light as the conclave concludes.

scenes.heading: INT. CASA SANTA MARTA - BACK OFFICE - EVENING
scenes.summary: In the back office, the caged canary begins to quietly chirp in response to sounds from outside.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREETS IN ROME - EVENING
scenes.summary: The ancient streets of Rome lie deserted with abandoned newspapers and cars, showing a city frozen during the papal selection.

scenes.heading: I/E. SHOP - STREET NEAR VATICAN - EVENING
scenes.summary: Cardinal Lawrence appears at the shop with plastic Pietàs from the opening, carrying a suitcase before disappearing around a corner.
scenes.turningPointNote: Lawrence's final appearance suggests his journey's end and departure from the Vatican intrigue

scenes.heading: INT. SALE E TABACCHI - EVENING
scenes.summary: In a nearly empty café, a TV shows Cardinal Brotzkus announcing 'Habemus Papam' as a small figure in white steps onto the balcony to deafening celebrations.
scenes.turningPointNote: The climactic revelation of the new Pope's identity resolves the central conflict of the papal conclave
